choices.text: Cryptographic clock via continuous hash chain. Each hash proves what happened before it. Validators don't need to agree on time — the chain self-orders. Result: parallelism in block production; no consensus round-robin.

questions.explanation: PoH = verifiable global clock enabling parallel block production.

choices.text: Set priority fee via ComputeBudgetProgram.setComputeUnitPrice + reasonable CU limit. Local fee markets per write-locked account; hot accounts cost more. Priority fees move tx ahead in leader's queue.

questions.explanation: Priority fees + CU budget control congestion behavior.
